description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a rectangular display framed by a moderately thick, matte black bezel. The front of the monitor features a widescreen display showing a web browser interface with several colorful icons, suggesting it is powered on. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, oval-shaped pedestal stand that connects to the back of the screen with a vertical support. The rear of the monitor is plain, with a slightly recessed central panel and no visible ports or buttons. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a professional appearance suitable for office or home use.
description: A modern flat-panel computer monitor with a matte black bezel and an oval pedestal stand, featuring a widescreen display and a clean, professional look.
description_view_0: The rear of the monitor is visible, showing a plain, matte black surface with a slightly recessed central panel and the pedestal stand attachment.
description_view_1: The monitor is seen from an upper side angle, highlighting the thin profile, matte bezel, and the powered-on display with visible web browser icons.
description_view_2: The front of the monitor is shown, displaying a widescreen interface with colorful icons and a matte black bezel framing the screen.
description_view_3: The monitor is viewed from the rear side, emphasizing the stand's attachment and the plain back panel without visible ports or buttons.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is moderately thick, matte black, with straight edges and slightly rounded corners, providing a subtle frame around the display without decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is an oval-shaped pedestal base made of black plastic or metal, with a vertical support connecting to the rear of the monitor; it appears sturdy but does not show visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons are visible on the front, sides, or rear in the provided views; button placement is not apparent from the images.
